creator: maurice@castro.aus.net
text:
Hi Jason,
	I have built the new version and I am attaching a patch file ... however ... the port devel/php-libawl will also require updating before this patch will work. I used the current version - 0.50 of libawl for testing and it worked but there is no guarantee of correct operation until 0.51 is updated in the ports collection. As a result I have made the patch test for version 0.51.

	Maurice

On 30/01/2012, at 11:59 AM, Jason Helfman wrote:

> I was just about to send in this update, but noticed there is a newer
> version. Would you mind testing the latest version, and sending in a diff?
> 
> v1.0.2
> 
> Thanks,
> Jason
> 
> -- 
> Jason Helfman         | FreeBSD Committer
> jgh@FreeBSD.org       | http://people.freebsd.org/~jgh
